query:
SELECT c.external_id, c.status,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM debt_collected_cache dcc WHERE dcc.section='Fastfone365' AND dcc.contract_external_id=c.external_id) as cache_rows,
       (SELECT SUM(CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) FROM debt_collected_cache dcc WHERE dcc.section='Fastfone365' AND dcc.contract_external_id=c.external_id) as cache_total
FROM contracts c
WHERE c.section = 'Fastfone365' AND c.external_id = '19654';
